Terms

Space Invaders: Defense Grid

This game is provided as an arcade entertainment experience. Progress, rewards, coins, and unlocks are virtual gameplay items with no cash value.

Rewarded ads are optional. If an ad is unavailable, incomplete, or fails, the game may continue without granting the associated optional reward.

Do not exploit bugs, automate gameplay, or interfere with platform services. Access may be limited if abuse or unsafe behavior is detected.

Contact: replace-this-email@example.com
